title: Snowflake CEO on AI Risk, Product Innovation and Winning Enterprise Customers
description:
Ann Berry is joined by Sridhar Ramaswamy, CEO of Snowflake to discuss Project SnowWork, the company’s new platform that brings outcome-driven AI agents into enterprise workflows. They break down why constant innovation is critical as AI drives competition across the software industry. They also discuss Snowflake’s path to GAAP profitability, its M&A strategy, and how volatility is impacting compensation structures.

title: Snowflake (SNOW) Q4-26 earnings: The $400M megadeal & throttling AI to save client budgets
show: Earnings Unscripted: Stock Earnings Calls & Analysis
description:
Snowflake lands the largest contract in company history as backlog nears $10B, but a $600M acquisition and aggressive AI scaling are putting fresh pressure on margins.
In ~10 minutes:
• Why Snowflake is rolling out "user caps" to stop AI-driven billing sticker shock 🤖
• The $400M megadeal and why nine-figure contracts are becoming the new norm
• Breaking down the $600M Observe acquisition and its 150bps margin hit
• The "Christian Bot" and how AI agents are rewriting the SaaS playbook

Snowflake

title: Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy Talks Earnings, AI Demand
description:
Snowflake expects fiscal 2027 product revenue of $5.7 billion, above analysts’ average estimate of $5.5 billion compiled by LSEG, driven by rising AI demand. CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy said the company signed its largest deal ever, over $400 million, without naming the client. He speaks with Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde. 
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: Snowflake Inc. (SNOW) Announced Q4 2026 Earnings on February 25, 2026, Reporting "Product revenue in Q4 grew 30% year-over-year to reach $1.23 billion."
description: Snowflake reported fourth quarter fiscal 2026 product revenue of $1.23 billion, representing 30% year-over-year growth. Remaining performance obligations reached $9.77 billion, with year-over-year growth accelerating to 42%. The company also reported a net revenue retention rate of 125%. For the full fiscal year 2026, Snowflake achieved a non-GAAP product gross margin of 75.8%, a non-GAAP operating margin of 10.5%, and a non-GAAP adjusted free cash flow margin of 25.5%. title: The AI Earnings Reset: Q1 2026 Profit Warnings Trigger Tech Selloff and Massive Sector Rotation
description: Tech valuations are getting hammered as Q1 2026 earnings season exposes the margin compression crisis behind AI capital spending. This episode breaks down the dramatic reversals in AMD, Snowflake, and Broadcom, the institutional rotation into energy and bonds, and why Goldman Sachs says the real issue isn't earnings today-it's margin uncertainty tomorrow. We cover the nearly five hundred billion dollar bond market inflows, corporate credit spreads trading tight at four point eight one percent yi

title: Snowflake & Databricks Cross the Rubicon into a New Competitive Domain
Olympic Fallout, Michkov Speaks, Rising Stocks - Snow The Goalie Ep. 294
show: Snow the Goalie: A Flyers Podcast
description:
Anthony SanFilippo and Russ Joy are LIVE from Chickie's & Pete's at Parx Casino in Bensalem, PA! The guys discuss Team USA's win in the Gold Medal Game; the play of Travis Sanheim, Rasmus Ristolainen, and Dan Vladar; and whether Risto's play has raised his stock on the trade market. Plus, Matvei Michkov finally speaks to the media about his position, working out during the Olympic break, and his relationship with Rick Tocchet.

title: NASCAR LIVE 2-3-26 : Joey Logano, Carson Hocevar
description:
February is here and so is a brand new episode of NASCAR Live. On this week's show we chat with 2 of the most talked about men in NASCAR, Joey Logano and Carson Hocevar. With the Clash's postponement we also revisit past NASCAR races that have been impacted by snow. We also flashback to one of the most memorable races in NASCAR history, the 2001 Daytona 500.
